summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 are substantially implemented. SportContext.tsx is created with all required types and functions. App.tsx wraps the app with SportProvider. ActivateSportScreen imports useSport, calls activateSport, and navigates to /map. The five required sports are all present. All acceptance criteria appear to be met. Minor extra features were added beyond the spec.

hallucinated_features.description: Swimming and Cycling sport options added to ActivateSportScreen beyond the five required sports (Soccer, Basketball, Tennis, Running, Yoga)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies sport icons for Soccer, Basketball, Tennis, Running, and Yoga only. The diff adds Swimming and Cycling as additional sports not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: localStorage side effects (sb_activeSport, sb_status) written in onPickSport handler
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any localStorage persistence as part of the sport activation flow. This was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: activatePresence(sportName) called inside onPickSport alongside activateSport
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requires calling activateSport from useSport and then navigating. Calling activatePresence is not part of the specified requirements.
